zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaretha Van Croy Van Nieuwpoort於1568年10月11日出生在德國史萊斯維-爾斯坦可萊斯 諾爾德福利曼德素姆時，她的父親Phillipe de Croy Aerschot Van Hoesen42歲，母親Johanna Henriette de Halewyn24歲。她和John Ellingsen Lynn至少有3個兒子。她去世於1614年在她的家鄉享年46歲。

variants.name: Margaret
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

meanings: Short form of   Ivan   or   Evan  , as in the case of the American film actor  Van Heflin  (  1910–71 , born  Emmett Evan Heflin ) and the Northern Irish singer  Van Morrison  (  b. 1945  as  George Ivan Morrison ).

en.lifeSummary: When Margaretha Van Croy Van Nieuwpoort was born on 11 October 1568, in Husum, Nordfriesland, Schleswig-Holstein, Germany, her father, Phillipe de Croy Aerschot Van Hoesen, was 42 and her mother, Johanna Henriette de Halewyn, was 24. She had at least 3 sons with John Ellingsen Lynn. She died in 1614, in her hometown, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaretha Van Croy Van Nieuwpoort est née le 11 octobre 1568, à Husum, Kreis Nordfriesland, Schleswig-Holstein, Allemagne, son père, Phillipe de Croy Aerschot Van Hoesen, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Johanna Henriette de Halewyn, avait 24 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils avec John Ellingsen Lynn. Elle est décédée en 1614, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaretha Van Croy Van Nieuwpoort am 11. Oktober 1568 in Husum, Kreis Nordfriesland, Schleswig-Holstein, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Phillipe de Croy Aerschot Van Hoesen 42 und ihre Mutter Johanna Henriette de Halewyn 24. Sie hatte mit John Ellingsen Lynn mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb 1614 im Alter von 46 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaretha Van Croy Van Nieuwpoort è nata il il 11 ottobre 1568 nel Husum, Kreis Nordfriesland, Schleswig-Holstein, Germania, sua padre, Phillipe de Croy Aerschot Van Hoesen, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Johanna Henriette de Halewyn, aveva 24 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli con John Ellingsen Lynn. Morì nel 1614, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaretha Van Croy Van Nieuwpoortが1568年10月11日にドイツスチレスウィグ-hオルステインクレイス ノードフリースランドハスムで生まれた時，父Phillipe de Croy Aerschot Van Hoesenは42歳，母Johanna Henriette de Halewynは24歳であった。彼女はJohn Ellingsen Lynnとの間に少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1614年に故郷で46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaretha Van Croy Van Nieuwpoort(이)가 1568년 10월 11일 독일 슐레스위그-홀스타인 크레이스 노르드프리슬랜드 후수에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Phillipe de Croy Aerschot Van Hoesen(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Johanna Henriette de Halewyn(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 John Ellingsen Lynn(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1614년 그녀의 고향에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaretha Van Croy Van Nieuwpoort nasceu em 11 de outubro de 1568, em Husum, Kreis Nordfriesland, Schleswig-Holstein, Alemanha, seu pai, Phillipe de Croy Aerschot Van Hoesen, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Johanna Henriette de Halewyn, tinha 24 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos com John Ellingsen Lynn. Ela faleceu em 1614, em sua cidade natal, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaretha Van Croy Van Nieuwpoort родилась 11 октября 1568 г. в местности хусум, крис нордфриесланд, щлесвиг-холстин, Германия, её отцу по имени Phillipe de Croy Aerschot Van Hoesen было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Johanna Henriette de Halewyn, 24. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына от John Ellingsen Lynn. Она умерла в 1614 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaretha Van Croy Van Nieuwpoort nació el 11 de octubre de 1568, en Husum, Kreis Nordfriesland, Schleswig-Holstein, Alemania, su papá, Phillipe de Croy Aerschot Van Hoesen, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Johanna Henriette de Halewyn, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos con John Ellingsen Lynn. Murió en 1614, en su pueblo, a la edad de 46 años.
